## Hard Gates (Non-Negotiable)

| Gate | Command / Check | Applies |
|------|-----------------|---------|
| **Full solution ≥956** | `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal` | Every merge + closeout |
| **ReplayGolden 6/6** | `dotnet test …Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests… --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests"` | Every sim/delegation merge |
| **DelegationBridge ZERO touch** | `git diff main -- src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter/Bridge/DelegationBridge.cs` → empty | Unity-track stories (S31-07, S31-08) |
| **CatalogWriteGate extend-only** | `npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate` before every edit | S31-02, S31-03, S31-09, S31-10, S31-11 |
| **No 7208 sensor in CI** | Curated fixtures only in `dotnet test` | S31-02, S31-10, S31-11 |
| **No physical TL forks** | `rg TlBranchDatabase\|BranchDatabase` → zero | S31-03 |
| **Production Baltic hash** | World hash `17144800277401907079` unchanged unless producer approves | S31-04, S31-05, S31-06 |

## Sign-Off Criteria

Sprint 31 QA sign-off (`/team-qa sprint`) requires:

1. All must-have stories **PASS** in story table
2. Closeout smoke doc **PASS** (≥996, replay 6/6)
3. No open S1/S2 bugs
4. Advisory conditions documented for S31-07/08 if Editor captures skipped (lean mode)
